content: [{"id":"382f5cc3-cd6c-46e7-8836-b9791963c8df","component":"Section","data":{"title":"About me","subtitle":"","align":"left","background":"none","className":""},"children":[]},{"id":"cde888eb-c43e-4e72-b663-02f2ee2a54d6","component":"Divider","data":{"variant":"spacer","size":"md","label":"","className":""},"children":[]},{"id":"d9946c51-a860-4abf-9660-997ea5d44209","component":"Text","data":{"content":"I'm John, a Software Engineer based in Sheffield with around 9/10 years of commercial experience. I work primarily in PHP, C# and Node.js, and over the years I've built up a deep understanding of all three. Not just how to use them, but how they actually work.","tag":"p","align":"left","weight":"regular","color":"","fontSize":"","fontFamily":"Inter, sans-serif","lineHeight":"","letterSpacing":"","marginBottom":"","className":""},"children":[]},{"id":"9116bb44-eff4-4ebe-ab4a-84861d22069b","component":"Text","data":{"content":"On the C# side, that curiosity recently led me to start building PHPIL, a PHP engine written in C# that compiles and runs PHP on the IL CLR. It sits at the intersection of language design, runtime engineering and compiler theory, and it started the way most interesting projects do: I spent long enough understanding CLR internals that \"I wonder if I could...\" became \"let's find out.\"","tag":"p","align":"left","weight":"regular","color":"","fontSize":"","fontFamily":"Inter, sans-serif","lineHeight":"","letterSpacing":"","marginBottom":"","className":""},"children":[]},{"id":"6afeccf0-a351-4b7a-be4f-104ec0fafef2","component":"Text","data":{"content":"I started my engineering career with 5 years at J E James Cycles, where I designed and built a competitor intelligence engine tracking over 120,000 products across 13 competitors, with a confidence-based matching system that automatically mapped 84,000 of them. After that I took a deliberate step away from software to serve in the British Armed Forces, which taught me how to stay composed under pressure, make sound decisions when the picture isn't complete, and take responsibility seriously. Those things don't leave you, and they show up in how I work every day.","tag":"p","align":"left","weight":"regular","color":"","fontSize":"","fontFamily":"Inter, sans-serif","lineHeight":"","letterSpacing":"","marginBottom":"","className":""},"children":[]},{"id":"9634f3bb-e610-4976-aacd-9b9c9deecc27","component":"Text","data":{"content":"Returning to engineering, I've worked across a broad range of domains including AI surveillance systems deployed in airports and law enforcement, analytics tooling, WebGL-powered 3D applications, bespoke eCommerce platforms and mobile apps. That mix of depth and variety means I can context-switch quickly, get up to speed on unfamiliar systems fast, and contribute meaningfully without needing hand-holding.","tag":"p","align":"left","weight":"regular","color":"","fontSize":"","fontFamily":"Inter, sans-serif","lineHeight":"","letterSpacing":"","marginBottom":"","className":""},"children":[]},{"id":"e2990675-1482-4217-b2a2-32b478c1f817","component":"Text","data":{"content":"I have a track record of inheriting complex, high-stakes systems and getting them to a place where they're actually maintainable. That means understanding why things are the way they are before touching anything, then making targeted, pragmatic improvements that move the needle without blowing up what already works.","tag":"p","align":"left","weight":"regular","color":"","fontSize":"","fontFamily":"Inter, sans-serif","lineHeight":"","letterSpacing":"","marginBottom":"","className":""},"children":[]},{"id":"f04d955c-dbfe-4124-a6b1-b4500dff9f78","component":"Text","data":{"content":"I take pride in doing good work, communicating clearly, and being the kind of engineer that teams are glad to have around. If that's what you're looking for, I'd love to hear from you.","tag":"p","align":"left","weight":"regular","color":"","fontSize":"","fontFamily":"Inter, sans-serif","lineHeight":"","letterSpacing":"","marginBottom":"","className":""},"children":[]}]

[{"id":"880f642f-16de-4052-b5bd-88fef722c843","component":"Section","data":{"title":"Get In Touch","subtitle":"","align":"left","background":"none","className":""},"children":[]},{"id":"a5b29f65-8209-4a70-9798-f75993e79126","component":"Divider","data":{"variant":"spacer","size":"md","label":"","className":""},"children":[]},{"id":"1d516ce3-dba3-4eff-ae63-0852f01fb59b","component":"Text","data":{"content":"Whether it's a role, a project, or just a conversation about CLR internals, I'm always happy to talk.","tag":"p","align":"left","weight":"regular","color":"","fontSize":"","fontFamily":"Inter, sans-serif","lineHeight":"","letterSpacing":"","marginBottom":"","className":""},"children":[]},{"id":"1c42e46d-2a95-443f-aaf7-1a88587796bd","component":"Text","data":{"content":"I'm currently open to senior engineering roles working primarily in PHP, C# or Node.js, either remote or Sheffield-based. If you have something that plays to deep technical knowledge, interesting problems and a team that cares about doing things properly, that's where I do my best work. I'm open to both permanent and contract arrangements, so don't let that stop you reaching out.","tag":"p","align":"left","weight":"regular","color":"","fontSize":"","fontFamily":"Inter, sans-serif","lineHeight":"","letterSpacing":"","marginBottom":"","className":""},"children":[]},{"id":"73a4d8fa-675a-42b8-8d83-6da5e6908f9e","component":"Text","data":{"content":"I'm currently available and responding to enquiries. Drop me a message using the form below, or reach me directly via the links on this page. I typically respond within a day or two.","tag":"p","align":"left","weight":"regular","color":"","fontSize":"","fontFamily":"Inter, sans-serif","lineHeight":"","letterSpacing":"","marginBottom":"","className":""},"children":[]},{"id":"cfa1e6a4-962f-4b4c-ba64-2cbd743f1c10","component":"Accordion","data":{"allowMultiple":"false","className":""},"children":[{"id":"4fc41714-e089-4f23-abea-9cd3e1c0fcfb","component":"AccordionItem","data":{"label":"Mobile","className":""},"children":[{"id":"d481641c-a53c-42d1-bf30-217db5b822ec","component":"Text","data":{"content":"07572557449","tag":"p","align":"left","weight":"regular","color":"","fontSize":"","fontFamily":"Inter, sans-serif","lineHeight":"","letterSpacing":"","marginBottom":"","className":""},"children":[]}]},{"id":"f055ed9a-49cf-4f8a-8c33-6a7b2b7d3328","component":"AccordionItem","data":{"label":"E-Mail","className":""},"children":[{"id":"73d687fd-4792-483d-a5bb-eb6f3ae7af88","component":"Text","data":{"content":"jhudson98new@gmail.com","tag":"p","align":"left","weight":"regular","color":"","fontSize":"","fontFamily":"Inter, sans-serif","lineHeight":"","letterSpacing":"","marginBottom":"","className":""},"children":[]}]}]}]
